query:
SELECT p.value_ref as "space_id!: String",
                      COUNT(*) as "cnt!: i64"
               FROM block_tag_refs r
               INNER JOIN blocks b
                   ON b.id = r.source_id
                  AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
               INNER JOIN block_properties p
                   ON p.block_id = COALESCE(b.page_id, b.id)
                  AND p.key = 'space'
                  AND p.value_ref IS NOT NULL
               WHERE r.tag_id = ?
               GROUP BY p.value_ref
               ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
               LIMIT 1
